# ABB — 800V DC Products for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## SACE Infinitus — Solid-State DC Circuit Breaker
- First IEC-certified solid-state DC circuit breaker for data centers
- Rated up to 1000V DC (covers 800V bus)
- Microsecond fault interruption (vs milliseconds for mechanical)
- Zero arc flash hazard
- Bidirectional current flow (supports solar-direct + battery)
- Modular, scalable design
- Digital connectivity — ABB Ability platform
- Status: Production units 2025-2026
- Pricing: Enterprise/project — premium over mechanical

## Other ABB 800V DC Products
- MNS Digital switchgear — modular LV, DC configurations
- SACE Emax 2 DC — air circuit breakers up to 1000V DC
- SACE Tmax XT DC — molded-case breakers for DC
- DC wallbox / distribution boards
- Hi-Trac DC contactors

## ABB + NVIDIA Partnership
- Listed in NVIDIA DSX ecosystem for power distribution and protection
- SACE Infinitus purpose-built for DSX 800V DC reference architecture
- ABB + Eaton joint LVDC safety framework published Q1 2026
